raw_consumer_statement: There are several charges for {$8.00} on my AMEX statement for " travel insurance. '' I have called AMEX multiple times and they refuse to remove the charges because they claim these charges are AMEX approved charges. I don't know anything about these {$8.00} insurance charges. I don't want these AMEX insurance charges. I never asked for these AMEX insurance products. They just discriminate against minorities with these ridicolous charges.
